lines.text: riomansukuna is an imaginary fierce god
with four arms and two faces without a doubt,

well, if sukuna regained all his power,

I would win I would take him
I am ready I'll wash his
feet with my hair if he needs
go give him when it's wrong

whole time, you haven't been able to
